# v21.0.4 vs v21.0.3

**Résumé** : 0 ajouté(s), 53 modifié(s), 0 supprimé(s)

## Composants

### Modifiés (53)

- `box/box.md` (37 → 37 lignes, +0)

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   
   ```html
  -<lu-box >Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.</lu-box>
  +<lu-box >Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</lu-box>
   ```
   
  @@ ... @@
   |----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
   | `toggle` | `toggle` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
  -| `neutral` | `neutral` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
  -| `killable` | `killable` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
  +| `neutral` | `neutral` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | Applique un fond gris. |
  +| `killable` | `killable` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | Ajoute un bouton de fermeture. |
   | `withArrow` | `withArrow` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
   
  ````

- `button/button.md` (42 → 42 lignes, +0)

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   ### ButtonComponent (component)
   
  -**Selectors:** `button[luButton]`, `a[luButton]`
  +**Selectors:** `button[luButton]`, `a[luButton]`, `span[luButton]`
   
   #### Inputs
  ````
